title: potentilla × wolffiana
intro: Potentilla × wolffiana, also known as Wolf's Clover, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, combining the Potentilla erecta and Potentilla neumanniana species. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds and has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potent medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Potentilla × wolffiana include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Potentilla × wolffiana typically involve its leaves and flowers being dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
